[p006_c0004] 
Note 1: Table above only includes information on funds actively managed by MTA Treasury in accordance with the Board approved Investment Guidelines. It does not include defeasance investments for tax benefit lease transactions or insurance set asides, 270 Park Avenue Fund, NYS and NYC Funds.
[p006_c0005] 
Note 2: MTA Transportation Resolution Funds include TRB Capitalized Interest, MTA TRB BAN (Tax-exempt) and RAN LOC.
[p006_c0006] 
Note 3: 'Other Restricted Funds' includes: MTA Moynihan Train Hall Stab Fulton Street Maintenance, Hudson Yard ERY/WRY - From Related, Hudson Yard Infra Corp., MTA Real Estate and Advertising Revenue, Relocation from Madison Ave., SIRTOA-Capital.
[p006_c0007] 
Note 4: MTA PMT Tax Exempt Working Capital includes BAN Proceeds and COI.
[p006_c0008] 
Note 5: MTA is the bondholder of the Hudson Yards 2020A bonds.
[p006_c0009]

Built from public NYC/MTA government records. Every structured record cites evidence blocks in official source documents. Data was extracted with an LLM pipeline and may contain errors — verify against the cited sources.

GitHub repository · Data releases · MIT-licensed code · To request a correction or takedown, open a GitHub issue.
